summary: REQ-22 is substantially implemented via a new AppleCalendarOverlay component and integration into DailyEntry.tsx, with CSS animations and styles in index.css. REQ-23 (deployment to Internet Computer mainnet) cannot be verified from code changes alone — no deployment scripts, dfx.json changes, canister ID updates, or CI/CD pipeline evidence are present in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Deploy the updated SwipeTrack Pro application to the Internet Computer mainnet/production network, replacing the current live deployment and making the update publicly accessible.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff contains only frontend source code changes (new component, CSS, page updates). There is no evidence of deployment artifacts, dfx deploy commands, updated canister IDs, CI/CD pipeline changes, or any other deployment-related file modifications that would indicate the app was actually deployed to the IC mainnet.
